reference.title: New and Noteworthy
reference.shortdesc: Here are descriptions of some of the more interesting or significant changes made to Eclipse Memory Analyzer for the 1.17.0 release.

copyright.copyrholder: Copyright (c) 2008, 2026 SAP AG, IBM Corporation and others. All rights reserved. This program and the accompanying materials are made available under the terms of the Eclipse Public License 2.0 which accompanies this distribution, and is available at https://www.eclipse.org/legal/epl-2.0/

section.title: Latest version of this document
section.p: The latest New and Noteworthy document for version 1.17.0 is available here.

ul.li: The standalone version comes wiht an updated Eclipse platform version. The required minimum Java version is now Java 21

The release contains a number of bugfixes and improvements:
Issue 143 Escaping $ references in OQL commands.
Issue 158 Fix ClassCastException in ComponentReportQuery.addZeroLengthArrays
Issue 145 CVE-2025-5222 in com.ibm.icu_77.1.0 - removed dependency on ICU
Issue 161 Fix AssertionFailedException in org.eclipse.jface.viewers.StructuredSelection.

section.title: New and Noteworthy for Memory Analyzer 1.16.0
